features: Spark Creative Family Fun – Our Christmas ornaments crafts wooden set includes 48 laser-cut shapes featuring gingerbread men, reindeer, and Santa sleighs. Keep kids entertained while creating personalised Christmas tree decorations together

Complete Craft Kit - Comes with 8 or 12 festive shapes, 12 coloured pens, and natural jute ropes - no need for additional purchases. Everything required for an afternoon of creative fun arrives in one box

Child-Safe Design - Each wooden piece features professionally laser-cut edges that are smooth to touch, eliminating worries about splinters or sharp edges. Perfect for little hands to decorate safely during family craft sessions

Build Lasting Memories - Watch your Christmas tree transform with handmade decorations that tell your family's unique story. The unfinished wood surfaces absorb colours beautifully, creating professional-looking results that children feel proud to display
Educational Benefits - Develops fine motor skills, colour recognition, and artistic expression in young children while helping teach children about festive traditions
description: Unleash Your Family's Creativity: The Complete Christmas Craft Experience Transform your Christmas preparations into an unforgettable family activity with our deluxe wooden ornament kit. Specifically designed for UK families seeking meaningful ways to connect during the festive season, this comprehensive set brings the magic of handmade decorations to your home while creating memories that will be treasured for years to come Why This Craft Kit Delivers the Perfect Family Activity: Combat Winter Boredom with Engaging Creative Fun -- 48 Ready-to-Decorate Pieces: Ample supplies for multiple children or several crafting sessions throughout December -- Educational Benefits: Develops fine motor skills, colour recognition, and artistic expression in young children -- Solves: The challenge of finding quality screen-free activities that keep children entertained during the Christmas break Everything Included for Immediate Creative Sessions -- 12 Vibrant Colouring Pens: Specially formulated for smooth application on wooden surfaces -- Natural Jute Hanging Cords: Add rustic charm while making decoration display effortless Premium Quality Ensures Beautiful Results -- Professional Laser Cutting: Each piece boasts precise details with consistently smooth edges -- Sustainable Wood Material: Natural wood provides the perfect canvas for colourful designs -- Family-Safe Materials: All components meet UK toy safety standards for complete peace of mind Perfect for British Christmas Traditions: - Advent Activity Countdown: Create a few decorations each day throughout December - Christmas Eve Box Essential: Perfect addition to your family's Christmas Eve traditions - School Craft Projects: Teachers can use for classroom activities and Christmas fairs - Rainy Day Rescue: Ideal entertainment during typical British winter weather - Personalised Gift Creation: Children can make special decorations for grandparents and relatives Technical Specifications: Materials: Natural wood, natural jute cord Shapes: 8 or 12designs Pens: 12 assorted colours Age Suitability: 3+ years (with adult supervision)
